_comment: P3d cross-model adversarial round. You are a red-teamer breaking the seal system. Every submission is re-run deterministically by our oracle (bounty_adjudicate.py) — claims are not trusted. A confirmed negative (cannot break) from an independent adversary is a valid, valuable result.
public_sealed_samples: registry/modules/*.sealed.json (attack any; they carry u_hash + tier)
adjudication: scripts/bounty_adjudicate.py (verdicts: BREAK | HELD | DOC_GAP | NEW_GAP | INVALID)

targets.goal: module spec (bloq+golden+meta) for a NONTRIVIAL gate that passes C1-C4 but whose bloq is semantically hollow (answer smuggled in, not decomposed).
targets.known_gap: matrixgate-shortcut is already documented; reproducing it = DOC_GAP. A hollow seal our static scan does NOT flag = NEW_GAP (escalated).

targets.goal: sources that are co-erroneous (one shared WRONG u_hash) yet ESTABLISH as MULTIMODEL.
targets.break_if: gated_seal returns SEAL while all sources share one u_hash (co-error).

targets.goal: >=2 independent authorings under a wrong convention that still ESTABLISH a non-GT matrix.
targets.break_if: establish_truth returns ESTABLISHED with key != hash(reference_gt).
